arts.ttl: Liverpool learn Marc Guehi transfer decision as Crystal Palace eye move for Reds attacker?
arts.sum: Crystal Palace defender Marc Guehi is reportedly favouring a move to Liverpool above all other potential transfers ahead of the January window.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Southampton now want to sign £8.4m player for Ivan Juric in January with Ipswich also keen
Marc Guehi 'wants to join Liverpool and is willing to wait to get his move' with his contract ticking down - as Crystal Palace 'eye up Reds wonderkid as part of deal'
arts.sum: This season Guehi has captained a struggling Palace side, playing 22 games in all competitions and remaining one of the stand-out performers for Oliver Glasner's men.

arts.ttl: “They should’ve sacked him sooner” – Southampton old boy thinks club is doomed, been run into ground
arts.sum: Southampton currently find themselves rooted to the bottom of the Premier League table with just six points from the 18 matches they’ve played so far this season. arts.ttl: Southampton to battle Nottingham Forest, Benfica for 22-year-old Brazilian starlet?
arts.sum: Southampton are reportedly preparing an imminent bid for Palmeiras defender Vanderlan, who is also attracting interest from Nottingham Forest and Benfica.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace trio all priorities when it comes to loan moves in January transfer window
arts.sum: Left-footed Umeh, who arrived from Cork City at the end of the January transfer window in 2022, has been an unused substitute for Oliver Glasner’s team six times in the Premier League. A trio of Crystal Palace U21 players lead the list of academy loan priorities as we head into the January window.
